name.ja: <ruby>火<rt>か</rt></ruby><ruby>霊<rt>れい</rt></ruby><ruby>術<rt>じゅつ</rt></ruby><ruby>師<rt>し</rt></ruby>の<ruby>使<rt>つか</rt></ruby>い<ruby>魔<rt>ま</rt></ruby>

requirement.en: Send this face-up card from your field or the top card of your Deck to the Graveyard.

effect.en: Make 1 face-up monster on your opponent's field become FIRE Attribute until the end of this turn. Then, you can change 1 face-down "Hiita the Fire Charmer" on your field to face-up Defense Position.
